title: Thailand uncovers one of Southeast Asia’s largest dinosaurs - TV BRICS
summary_full: Thailand uncovers one of Southeast Asia’s largest dinosaurs  TV BRICSGiant new dinosaur identified from fossils in Thailand  BBCThe first sauropod dinosaur from the Lower Cretaceous Khok Kruat Formation of Thailand enriches the diversity of somphospondylan titanosauriforms in southeast Asia | Scientific Reports  NatureA few rocks spotted near a pond in northeastern Thailand in 2016 have just been confirmed as a 27-tonne, 27-metre sauropod — the largest dinosaur ever found in Southeast Asia  Space DailyA new species offers a clue to the boom of giant dinosaurs  National Geographic
